reviews.review_description: Just a horrible game no AI to fight no player base can wait an hour and find no match. Got my cousin to get it so we can play a match and it took multiple tries for us to get in. Gameplay is horrible get TOTF2 just came out today sad I wasted money on this garbage.
I want my money back
just wait until thrill of the fight 2 at this point.

reviews.review_title: Best PVP boxing game so far
reviews.review_description: The power evaluation is accurate and my workout experience overall is great. However, the game is still in development so it's still buggy, and the game needs to remove hammer fists and buff the body shots. Overall, this game is great. Here's the discord link for any of you idiots who rated the game 1 star because you couldn't find the discord link: https://discord.com/invite/XZhKXxVQ

developer_response.body: Very much appreciate your review, thank you for taking the time to post it! Good points made here.

reviews.review_description:
The much-anticipated PvP boxing game has finally arrived, offering a simulator-like experience distinctly different from games like Creed. Its refreshing gameplay comes at a value price, truly making it a steal. If you're weary of the puzzle-punching in TOTF or the speed running around the ring in Creed, this is the game for you. You'll soon discover there's a steep learning curve, especially when facing off against seasoned players with real-life boxing experience. Plus, it's an incredible workout!
Official game discord link
https://discord.gg/UkUw8gkYc4

developer_response.body: Thank you greatly for taking the time to post your thoughts!

reviews.review_description: Not understanding how to get the discord to play other people.

developer_response.body: Did you perhaps try following the discord link from our website, or reading any of the previous reviews which offer join help, or sending an email to our support address?

reviews.review_description: What a waste of time I bought this thinking it will be like thrill of the fight but online btw I am a amateur boxer and when I get into a game after waiting 2 years I get this kid who goes into my wall so I can’t punch him and he beats me also when we are trading shot mine for some reason go right through him and don’t count and he knocked me down

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear you lost your match. Be sure you have the recommended play area and stay in the center of it when fighting. And no, TOTF is single player, so of course it will have a completely different feel.

reviews.review_title: Best PvP Boxing game - lots of potential
reviews.review_description:
Single player is limited to training dummy, heavy bag (which I love) and a motionless sparring partner at the minute. You need to join discord to really begin the fun. Here you can arrange pvp matches whilst the community grows.

I must say I really enjoyed the pvp. Definitely the best pvp boxing game on VR and an excellent multiplayer alternative to TOTF solo play.

Boxing skills are rewarded. It's certainly not pure arcade and there are some nice clever touches. A big playspace helps. It's early access on quest so not perfect but well worth the small cost and supporting the developer.

Thanks
@VRSportz

developer_response.body: Can't say how much we appreciate your early review, thanks for taking the time to write it, and for playing EOC. We have loads of new content and refinements on the way.

reviews.review_description: https://discord.com/invite/7ah56smavV

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to post your review!

reviews.review_description: There’s barely anything to do now

Barely any of my punches register even when I know they are landing it is just clipping through the guy and not doing any damage. Fix your hit boxes and damage system  because if you can just pitty pat me to death while I'm landing hard hooks, then something is wrong.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the note - at this point there's nothing broken in PvP, though hits are more difficult to land due to anti-spam mechanics and requiring a closer wrist/knuckle alignment than most VR games. The mechanics are being adjusted with the next update which addresses some changes to guard positioning. The hits are registered the same way on the practice dummy as in PvP. Practice there to check your impact angles etc. Hit boxes and damage system have not been changed FYI and are unrelated to the requirements for knuckle and wrist alinement.

reviews.review_description: I like the game very competitive it’s fun and a it’s good work out

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to share your review with us, more updates are on the way, thanks for helping us out through early access!

reviews.review_description: Its a very unique game with tons of features! for a early access game this game is amazing man, the graphics arent bad. the gameplay feels fun and smooth also! if your struggling to find a match heres the discord link where you get pvp every day! https://discord.gg/yatuYgRY

It will not let me in the game

developer_response.body: Did you perhaps try following the discord link from our website to ask for help, or sending an email to our support address?

reviews.review_description: wouldn’t even buy for 1p

It’s an ok game but I can’t find anybody to fight and every time i click quick match I wait and wait and still no one is there to fight me I can’t even find anyone in pvp lobby’s this game kinda sucks

developer_response.body: We're sorry you didn't read the game description before trying it out. PVP ONLY - while there are some basic solo training features, the core of the game is its multiplayer aspect. It may be very difficult to find opponents via the Quickmatch feature until the game builds an audience online. So our recommendation in these early days is to be sure you pick up EOC with a friend so you have someone reliable to battle while our player base builds and the game matures.
